title: Agent OS: Browser-Based Agent Management
changes: Add /agents page with agent panel web components and layout manager
Add liaison chat panel with approval cards and @mention support
Add API key management to settings (AES-256-GCM encrypted storage)
Add Agents link to navigation bar
Add object_create and object_update SSE listeners to kanban
Agent panels show real-time SSE event streams per agent
Layout presets: single, dual, triple, quad, focus
